Class TransactionPersistenceAdapter

java.lang.Object
com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.TransactionPersistenceAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
TransactionRepository
@Component public class TransactionPersistenceAdapter extends Object implements TransactionRepository
Outbound persistence adapter implementing the TransactionRepository port.

Translates between the pure domain Transaction object and the JPA TransactionJpaEntity. Transactions are append-only; no update logic exists.

Since:
1.0.0
Version:
1.0.0
Author:
Core Banking Team

  • Method Details

    • save

      public Transaction save(Transaction transaction)
      Persists a new Transaction record to the store.
      Specified by:
      save in interface TransactionRepository
      Parameters:
      transaction - the transaction to persist
      Returns:
      the saved domain transaction

    • findById

      public Optional<Transaction> findById(UUID transactionId)
      Finds a transaction by its unique identifier.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface TransactionRepository
      Parameters:
      transactionId - the UUID to look up
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the domain transaction, or empty

    • findByIdempotencyKey

      public Optional<Transaction> findByIdempotencyKey(String idempotencyKey)
      Finds the most recent transaction associated with a given idempotency key.

      Used to retrieve the cached outcome of a previously processed transfer when an idempotent replay is detected.

      Specified by:
      findByIdempotencyKey in interface TransactionRepository
      Parameters:
      idempotencyKey - the key to search by
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the matching domain transaction, or empty

    • toEntity

      private TransactionJpaEntity toEntity(Transaction t)
      Maps a domain Transaction to a JPA TransactionJpaEntity.
      Parameters:
      t - the domain transaction
      Returns:
      the corresponding JPA entity

    • toDomain

      private Transaction toDomain(TransactionJpaEntity e)
      Maps a JPA TransactionJpaEntity to a domain Transaction.
      Parameters:
      e - the JPA entity
      Returns:
      the corresponding domain transaction
